hero.headline: Gargano isn't described.
hero.subtitle: Carefully curated vacation apartments on the Gargano Promontory, Puglia.

about.headline: No detail left to chance. No moment wasted.
about.body: Cosmia Hospitality was born from a passion for Gargano and authentic hospitality. We manage every apartment as if it were our own, caring for every corner so that your stay is exactly as you imagined it — or better.

apartments.headline: Our apartments are the beginning of your Gargano story.
apartments.subtitle: Every space is designed to offer you comfort, authenticity and the freedom to explore.

experiences.headline: Gargano has a character all its own.
experiences.subtitle: From the sea to the caves, from the villages to the gastronomy: Gargano will surprise you at every turn.

sea.title: The Sea
sea.description: Crystal-clear waters, hidden coves and breathtaking cliffs. Gargano's sea is among the most beautiful in Italy.

hikes.title: Hiking
hikes.description: Trails in the Gargano National Park, sea caves and unforgettable sunsets on the promontory.

villages.title: Villages
villages.description: Mattinata, Vieste, Peschici: ancient villages where time flows slowly and every alley has a story.

food.title: Gastronomy
food.description: Extra virgin olive oil, fresh burrata, catch of the day: the flavors of Gargano are an experience in themselves.

cta.headline: Tell us about yourself.
cta.headlineBold: We'll take care of the rest.
cta.subtitle: Have questions? Want to check availability? Write to us — we'll respond within a few hours.

footer.tagline: Premium vacation apartments on the Gargano, Puglia.

contact.headline: Tell us about yourself.
contact.subtitle: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. You can also write to us directly on WhatsApp.

form.name: Full Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your needs, the dates you're considering, or any questions...
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or write to us on WhatsApp.

about_page.headline: A passion for Gargano.
about_page.section1Body: Cosmia Hospitality was born from a love for one of Italy's most beautiful territories. We manage vacation apartments on the Gargano with a simple approach: every home should be exactly as the guest imagined it — or better. Nothing left to chance, nothing taken for granted.
about_page.section2Body: We don't manage apartments. We curate experiences. From property selection to the care of every detail, from check-in to check-out, we are present to make your stay on Gargano unforgettable. We know the territory, the hidden places, the authentic flavors — and we're happy to share them.

care.title: Care
care.description: Every apartment is personally selected and maintained. No compromises.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: The real Gargano, the one tourists don't find. We know it.

presence.title: Presence
presence.description: We're always available. A message, a call, we're there.

apartments_page.headline: Choose your corner of Gargano.
apartments_page.subtitle: Two unique apartments, curated in every detail, in the heart of the Apulian promontory.

cookie.message: This website uses essential technical cookies for proper functionality. No profiling data is collected.
